_comment: READ-side pool-visibility allowlist (YUK-569). Site-level exceptions for a file that intentionally keeps a hand-rolled family-1 pool-visibility predicate (draft_status IS NULL OR <> 'draft') inline instead of routing through notDraftPredicate/isPoolVisible (src/db/predicates.ts) — e.g. mid-migration. Each entry MUST carry reason + resolves_when {kind,ref,expected_by} (same contract as audit-draft-status-allowlist.json). SEEDED EMPTY: post-YUK-569 every family-1 read routes through the shared helper, so the baseline is clean (spec §5). UNKNOWN-SHAPE hits and helper-def sentinel issues are NOT allowlistable — triage them. See docs/design/2026-07-05-draft-status-pool-predicate-dedup-spec.md §6.5.
